CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (long functions identified) ✓

Functions to refactor:

- figma-merge.py::main (189 lines) — parse_args, load_inputs, run_merge_pipeline, write_outputs
- check-script-writes.py::find_violations_in_ast (183 lines) — extract helper walk functions
- ticket-graph.py::main (137 lines) — _find_tracker_dir already inner; extract _handle_link_mode, _handle_deps_query
- ticket-graph.py::add_dependency (124 lines) — _check_cycles, _guard_closed_tickets
- figma_resync.py::run (156 lines) — _display_change_summary, _confirm_and_finalize
- check-file-syntax.py — no long functions (misidentified; violations are in check-script-writes.py)
